changes: Google sign-in — each person has their own account and private lists
Real-time sync — changes appear on both phones instantly via Firestore listeners
List sharing — generate a 6-character invite code to share any list; valid 48 hours
Per-user data — categories, stores, and display settings are private to each account
Added by — items record who added them; toggle display in Settings; filter by person
User section in Settings — shows your name and sign-out button
Testing user toggle removed — real auth replaces it
List ordering field — orderIndex on each list, ready for drag-to-reorder UI

history.summary: Multi-store filter fixed to show items with ANY selected store (was requiring ALL).
List name editing moved into edit modal. Multi-select store filter. Item display settings (show/hide price, store, category, added-by). Store tags as faint pills on item rows.
Root fix: data.addItem never persisted listId — every item was saved to default list.
List tabs switch on tap. Edit modal has fixed-height icon grid and live preview. Delete moved into edit modal.
Lucide icon picker with search for lists. Category icon picker gets search. addOrIncrement scoped to active list.
Fixed missing functions (promptAddStore, deleteStoreConfirm, deleteCategoryConfirm). Icon CDN pinned to verified version.
Global category order IS the aisle order. Stores simplified to tags only. 80+ icons. Cleaner settings.

knownLimitations: No Firebase Storage — photos not yet supported in Phase 2
Light/dark mode toggle not yet implemented
List drag-to-reorder not yet exposed in UI (data model ready)
roadmap: Push notifications when items are added or checked off
